node.text: Dave opened his own car maintenance shop, fulfilling his dream.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "new business venture") on Observation 1 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Dave opened his own car shop last week and celebrated with friends.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "new business venture") on Observation 1 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Dave is excited about the journey of running his car shop and is looking forward to what the future holds.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "new business venture") on Observation 2 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Dave is teaming up with a local garage and is working on a challenging project involving cars.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "new business venture") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.91)

node.text: Dave's shop works on all kinds of cars, including full restorations of classic cars.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "new business venture") on Observation 4 (Score: 0.64)

node.text: Dave loves working with mechanics and sharing his knowledge about cars.
Dave finds fulfillment in fixing things and enjoys the feeling of making something whole again.
Dave restored a car last year but sold it to a collector and is currently working on a new project.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "new business venture") on Observation 5 (Score: 0.62)

node.text: Dave values that his work is appreciated and brings joy to others.
Dave started working on cars at the age of ten after finding an old car in a neighbor's garage.
